description: Comparative corpus evidence module covering multiple historical cases under Koenigsberg's Law of Sacrifice (American Revolution, Napoleon, Lincoln, Hitler): a multi-case stratified corpus with manifest-driven pipeline and cross-case synthesis research site.
maintainerNotes: American Revolution and Napoleon have proposed PPW case IDs in data/corpora/sacrifice-law-comparative-41/cases.json, but the corresponding PPW case folders do not yet exist; create or approve those folders before importing their subsets. Rights vary by era; pre-1928 texts are generally public domain, Nazi-era translations and apparatus require review. Corpus import scheduled for Milestone 17; no artifacts imported yet as of Milestone 14.
